docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $992.00 FILED BY MAXFERD JEWELRY CO. AS TO DEFENDANT GOODE, THOMAS MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
